narrative: USD broadly offered as Iran reopens Strait of Hormuz, easing oil shock fears — risk sentiment improves. EUR/USD firms at 1.1802, GBP/USD extends gains to 1.3556, and AUD/USD rallies to 0.7191. Gold higher +1.72% on safe-haven demand amid geopolitical developments, while equities rise +1.47% and VIX at 17.5. USD/JPY pressured to 158.02 as JPY's safe-haven function appears compromised, with USD/CAD declining to 1.3670.
